006package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Amps;
009
010import com.pathplanner.lib.config.PIDConstants;
011
012import dev.doglog.DogLog;
013import edu.wpi.first.networktables.DoubleSubscriber;
014import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Current;
015
016public class Gains {
017
018    public interface Shooter {
019
020        DoubleSubscriber kP = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/kP", 13.0);
021
022        DoubleSubscriber kI = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/kI", 0.0);
023
024        DoubleSubscriber kD = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/kD", 0.0);
025
026        DoubleSubscriber kS = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/kS", 2.5);
027
028        DoubleSubscriber kV = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/kV", 0.05);
029
030        DoubleSubscriber kA = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/kA", 0.0);
031    }
032
033    // public interface Feeder {
034    // double kP = 0.1;
035    // double kI = 0.01;
036    // double kD = 0;
037    // double kS = 0.0;
038    // SmartNumber kV = new SmartNumber("Feeder/kV", 5.0);
039    // SmartNumber kA = new SmartNumber("Feeder/kA", 0.5);
040    // double kG = 0.0;
041    // }
042    public interface Intake {
043
044        // pivot gains
045        double kP = 300;//300
046
047        double kI = 0;
048
049        double kD = 75;
050
051        Current kS = Amps.of(0);
052
053        Current kV = Amps.of(0);
054
055        Current kA = Amps.of(0);
056
057        Current kG = Amps.of(-12);
058
059        public interface Digestion {
060
061            double kP = 325;
062
063            double kI = 0;
064
065            // TODO: tune
066            double kD = 75;
067        }
068    }
069
070    public interface Swerve {
071
072        public interface Drive {
073
074            double kS = 0.0;
075
076            double kV = 0.124;
077
078            double kA = 0.0;
079
080            double kP = 0.1;
081
082            double kI = 0.0;
083
084            double kD = 0.0;
085        }
086
087        public interface Turn {
088
089            double kS = 0.1;
090
091            double kV = 2.66;
092
093            double kA = 0.0;
094
095            double kP = 100.0;
096
097            double kI = 0.0;
098
099            double kD = 0.5;
100        }
101
102        public interface Alignment {
103
104            double kP = 1.0;
105
106            double kI = 0.0;
107
108            double kD = 0.0;
109
110            double akP = 8.8624;
111
112            double akI = 0.0;
113
114            double akD = 0.0;
115
116            double akS = 0.33753;
117
118            double akV = 0.97475;
119
120            double akA = 0.095509;
121
122            PIDConstants XY = new PIDConstants(10, 0.0, 0.0);
123
124            PIDConstants THETA = new PIDConstants(10, 0.0, 0.0);
125        }
126    }
127}
